transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hello, this is Alex from DemoCompany, calling about your DemoLender loan. There are some charges on your account I can help remove. Can we talk for a moment?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Hire.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Okay, give me just a moment...

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Okay, Arjun Nair. Could you please share what's been causing the delay with the payments?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Bullish. Hello? We have disconnected with the institution.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: We are not we are not happy with the services they have done.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I see. You're saying there's an issue with the services

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: So yeah, admission captured.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Admissions were canceled, and we have took an admission in some other institution.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I understand you're not happy with the services from the institution and have disconnected with them. It sounds like you're feeling dissatisfied with how things turned out.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Yes.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: And I told clearly we paid the already amount and

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Okay.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: rest of the balance amount to be canceled.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I hear you. I want to mention that even though there's a dispute, an unpaid loan can still negatively affect your credit score. Banks see it as an outstanding amount.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Okay. So that's what I clearly told them. I gave a notice also.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Right. And I understand you've already taken steps to address this. Just so you know, settling the payment doesn't mean you're giving up on your dispute with the institution. You can still pursue that separately while also stopping any further credit damage. We might even be able to remove some of the penalty charges from your fifty thousand rupees.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Yes. No. Why why do I have to pay? They disconnected with the institution.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I understand your point of view. Since this is beyond what I can resolve, I recommend reaching out to DemoLender directly. You can email them at support@demolender.com or call their customer service.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Yeah. You can please share a message. I will try to

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Alright. I've noted that. If you need anything else, please reach out. Take care.

params.root_cause: Dissatisfaction with educational institution services and admission process, leading to disconnection from the institute.

analysis.summary: The customer refuses to pay, stating dissatisfaction with the institution's services and canceled admission. They believe the remaining loan balance should be canceled and have already given notice, indicating no intent to pay.
